headline: FOX (NASDAQ:FOXA) Delivers Impressive Q1 CY2026
summary: Cable news and media network Fox (NASDAQ:FOXA) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, but sales fell by 8.6% year on year to $3.99 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.32 per share was 36.4% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
